description: A junior lawyer needs to create a concise summary of a key witness's deposition testimony.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent processes the full text of the transcript.

nodes.task_description: Identify the top 5-10 most important admissions or statements made by the witness.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent extracts the key pieces of testimony.

nodes.task_description: Draft a one-page summary of the deposition, organized by topic, with page/line citations for the key statements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a useful, well-organized summary for the case team.
